description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Register an adult recreational 5v5 team in the cheapest July tournament within about 100 miles of Denver using a deposit-only payment option.

target_names: Denver Night Hawks team registration using deposit-only plan

tasks.name: Register an adult recreational 5v5 team in the cheapest July tournament within about 100 miles of Denver using a deposit-only payment option.
tasks.description: Register an adult recreational 5v5 team in the cheapest July tournament within about 100 miles of Denver using a deposit-only payment option.

tasks.instruction: Register a 13-year-old player for the earliest August youth tournament that offers an early-bird individual fee below $120, choosing the highest available skill level.

target_names: 13U Advanced division at the earliest August youth tournament

tasks.name: Register a 13-year-old player for the earliest August youth tournament that offers an early-bird individual fee below $120, choosing the highest available skill level.
tasks.description: Register a 13-year-old player for the earliest August youth tournament that offers an early-bird individual fee below $120, choosing the highest available skill level.

tasks.instruction: Save three fall youth tournaments within roughly 200 miles of Chicago that guarantee at least four games and have team fees between $500 and $900 to your favorites list.
tasks.name: Save three fall youth tournaments within roughly 200 miles of Chicago that guarantee at least four games and have team fees between $500 and $900 to your favorites list.
tasks.description: Save three fall youth tournaments within roughly 200 miles of Chicago that guarantee at least four games and have team fees between $500 and $900 to your favorites list.

tasks.instruction: Log in and build an 8-player roster for your adult recreational team based in Denver, assigning jersey numbers 4–11 with at least one goalie, at least two defensemen, and the remaining players as forwards.

target_names: Denver Night Hawks adult recreational team

tasks.name: Log in and build an 8-player roster for your adult recreational team based in Denver, assigning jersey numbers 4–11 with at least one goalie, at least two defensemen, and the remaining players as forwards.
tasks.description: Log in and build an 8-player roster for your adult recreational team based in Denver, assigning jersey numbers 4–11 with at least one goalie, at least two defensemen, and the remaining players as forwards.

tasks.instruction: For an adult tournament that offers multiple team packages, register a 10-player team and choose the lowest-priced package that includes team jerseys and at least one practice session, as long as the per-player cost is under $180, paying the full amount at checkout.

target_names: Team Jerseys + 1 Practice package at the relevant tournament

tasks.name: For an adult tournament that offers multiple team packages, register a 10-player team and choose the lowest-priced package that includes team jerseys and at least one practice session, as long as the per-player cost is under $180, paying the full amount at checkout.

tasks.instruction: Open your existing registration for a spring adult tournament where your team is in an elite division, switch to the lowest-cost non-elite adult division available, and change the payment option to a plan with exactly three installments.

target_names: Existing elite registration for the spring adult tournament

tasks.name: Open your existing registration for a spring adult tournament where your team is in an elite division, switch to the lowest-cost non-elite adult division available, and change the payment option to a plan with exactly three installments.
tasks.description: Open your existing registration for a spring adult tournament where your team is in an elite division, switch to the lowest-cost non-elite adult division available, and change the payment option to a plan with exactly three installments.

tasks.instruction: Using the manager account for your team, find the date and time of the team’s first game and on that same date sign up the manager for two non-overlapping volunteer shifts, choosing the earliest shift that starts at least one hour after the game and then a later shift that does not overlap.

target_names: First qualifying volunteer shift after the team’s first game
Second non-overlapping volunteer shift later that same day

tasks.name: Using the manager account for your team, find the date and time of the team’s first game and on that same date sign up the manager for two non-overlapping volunteer shifts, choosing the earliest shift that starts at least one hour after the game and then a later shift that does not overlap.

tasks.instruction: Register an adult team for a May tournament where the standard full team fee is at most $625, choose the Pay in Full option, and apply the SAVE25 tournament coupon so that the discounted fee is below $600.

target_names: Adult team registration in a May tournament with SAVE25 applied

tasks.instruction: From the protective gear section, purchase three different protective items with a combined price under $150, making sure that one of them is a helmet in size Medium.
